steps.title: Define the term
steps.content: The student wants a definition of georeferencing. The relevant notes say it is the process of assigning geographic coordinates to an image so mapping software can place the image in its real-world location.

steps.title: Reject examples and uses
steps.content: Choice A describes López Marrero's use of georeferencing. Choice C describes one project but awkwardly repeats the term instead of defining it. Choice D describes what georeferenced photos can help researchers do. The complete definition fits the goal. The answer is B.
